title: michelia excelsa
intro: Michelia excelsa, also known as the Golden Bauhinia or Kanon, is a species of flowering plant in the magnolia family that is native to tropical Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Michelia excelsa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and seeds are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
